arts.ttl: Andy Campbell details Middlesbrough career low point that led to huge Cardiff City moment
arts.sum: Speaking to Dr Tosh Warwick for the Boro match-day programme #UTB, Campbell said: "To play for my club in my town in front of all my friends and family was the best feeling ever! The boyhood Boro fan went from watching his club from the stands to scoring memorable goals against Sunderland and Manchester United and also helping Bryan Robson's side win promotion back to the Premier League .

arts.ttl: Key thing Middlesbrough must do as Michael Carrick looks for springboard against Cardiff City
arts.sum: “As a team, to win 1-0 in that manner - we looked really solid in the most part, pressed really well and then, in the second half in particular, looked dangerous and controlled the game - collectively it was a really good performance away from home on a difficult pitch. Michael Carrick is hoping his Middlesbrough players use the late victory against Hull City as a springboard as he seeks greater consistency from his side this year.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough face anxious wait as Premier League clubs make Ben Doak transfer approach
arts.sum: However, they now face an anxious wait to see if they can keep a hold of one of their key players this month with clubs pushing to sign Doak on a permanent deal. Doak, 19, joined the club in the summer on a season-long loan deal from Liverpool and he has enjoyed a strong first half of the season under Michael Carrick .

arts.ttl: Liverpool set price for Ben Doak as Crystal Palace chase winger
arts.sum: The Scotland winger has impressed on loan at Middlesbrough and Palace are interested in bringing him to Selhurst Park

arts.ttl: Liverpool reject Palace and Ipswich approaches for winger Doak
arts.sum: Liverpool have knocked back approaches from Crystal Palace and Ipswich for winger Ben Doak.

arts.ttl: Ben Doak: Liverpool set asking price after rejecting £15m Crystal Palace bid?
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly set their asking price for teenage winger Ben Doak after turning down a £15m bid from Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Liverpool reject £15m bid from Crystal Palace for Ben Doak but expecting improved offer
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have had a £15million bid for Liverpool winger Ben Doak rejected.

arts.ttl: Liverpool reject Ben Doak bid as Premier League rivals fall short of valuation
arts.sum: Scotland international Ben Doak has been attracting interest from the Premier League after impressing on loan at Middlesbrough from Liverpool, but the Reds have a firm valuation

arts.ttl: Exclusive: How much Liverpool would be willing to sell Ben Doak for this month after Crystal Palace bid
arts.sum: Liverpool are open to selling Ben Doak this month after rejecting an initial bid for the Scottish winger. Doak is currently shining in the Championship...

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive £15 million offer for Ben Doak
arts.sum: But now reports, including via the Mail ‘s Sami Mokbel, claim Liverpool have received a £15 million offer for Doak from Crystal Palace . Ben Doak could be set to leave Liverpool on a permanent basis this month, with reports claiming the club have received a £15 million offer for the winger.
